title: HealthSync
description: Sync the health of all online players.
body:
![HealthSync banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40cd5d1dc053b02612d6645a1cb10d32348b8e2a.png)

### Features:

- Syncs the health of all online players.
- Really, really simple!

### Commands/Permissions

Commands:

`None`

Permissions:

`none`

### Issues

Please report all issues/errors on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/ItsMitlit/HealthSync/issues)
